name: multi-company-portal
description: Multi-company login portal that hosts the FinTrack financial app per tenant, with master/staff accounts.
whatsNew: Polished the notification bell — a cleaner glass panel, smoother ring animation, and clearer version and update steps.
Tap the bell in the top bar any time to see the new version number, how to update, and what changed.
Bank active/inactive switches, edits and deletes sync across all your devices.
